message:
Continue PhaseTracker migration in e2e_multi_connector and e2e_sources

Rewrite test bodies to use explicit tracker.start()/end() phase markers
with descriptive phase names (setup_fixtures, indexing, search_shared,
search_unique, etc.) instead of the logged_test! macro wrapper.
Restructures test flow to clearly delineate setup, action, and assertion
phases for improved E2E log output and debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
